debug_info.goal:
S : Type
rule : RelInt S
n : ℕ
f : Fin n → List (RelInt S)
⊢ rule ∈ Graphiti.Projects.Noc.RelInt.liftFinf S n f → ∃ i j, rule = (f i).get j

failed_attempts:
simp only [RelInt.liftFinf, List.mem_flatten, List.mem_map]
        rintro ⟨x, hx, h⟩
        exact ⟨x, (List.get?_eq_some.mp h).1, (List.get?_eq_some.mp h).2 ▸ rfl⟩

simp only [RelInt.liftFinf, List.mem_flatten, List.mem_map]
        rintro ⟨x, hx, h⟩
        exact ⟨x, (f x).indexOf_get h, h⟩
